title: CAWS Event Envelope (v1)
description: Common wrapper for every event in .caws/events.jsonl. Per-event payload schemas extend this via the 'data' field. See docs/internal/EVENTS_LOG_MIGRATION.md for the design.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence number, starts at 1 for the genesis event.

ts.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp. Informational only; ordering is by seq.

session_id.description: Session correlator. Defaults to env CAWS_SESSION_ID or 'standalone'.

actor.description: Who emitted the event. Subagent names may be added in future versions.

event.description: Event type from the v0 vocabulary. See the individual schema files.

spec_id.description: Required for spec-scoped events, optional for session/worktree lifecycle events.

data.description: Event-type-specific payload. Each event type has its own schema file that defines this object's shape.

prev_hash.description: Empty string for genesis, sha256:<hex> for all subsequent events.

event_hash.description: Domain-separated sha256 over the canonical JSON of the event with this field stripped.
